name: GO Feature Flag
description: Simple, complete and lightweight self-hosted feature flag solution, 100% open source. OpenFeature-native with 15+ language SDKs via relay proxy.

seo.title: GO Feature Flag — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: GO Feature Flag: Simple, complete and lightweight self-hosted feature flag solution, 100% open source. OpenFeature-native with 15+ language SDKs via relay proxy

when_to_use: Self-hosted feature flags with 15+ language SDKs
Flag definitions stored in Git, S3, or HTTP endpoints
Zero-latency local evaluation without remote calls

pros: Self-hosted, 100% open source with generous features
cons: Config and ops are your responsibility
UI less slick than SaaS alternatives
Scaling story needs planning at high QPS
review.verdict: One of the better OSS self-hosted flag options if you want OpenFeature compatibility without SaaS lock-in.
review.best_for: Engineering teams running flags in-house across many languages
review.not_for: Non-engineers wanting polished SaaS flag management

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
